testcases.input:
MKDIR /docs
TOUCH /docs/readme.txt
WRITE /docs/readme.txt hello world
READ /docs/readme.txt
LS /
LS /docs

MKDIR /a
MKDIR /a/b
MKDIR /a/b/c
TOUCH /a/b/c/file.txt
WRITE /a/b/c/file.txt deep content
READ /a/b/c/file.txt
LS /a
LS /a/b
LS /a/b/c

MKDIR /home
MKDIR /tmp
TOUCH /tmp/a.txt
TOUCH /tmp/b.txt
RM /tmp/a.txt
LS /tmp
RM /tmp
RM /tmp/b.txt
RM /tmp
LS /

MKDIR /keep
MKDIR /trash
MKDIR /trash/sub
TOUCH /trash/sub/file.txt
WRITE /trash/sub/file.txt data
RM /trash
RM -r /trash
LS /

MKDIR /src
MKDIR /dst
TOUCH /src/file.txt
WRITE /src/file.txt hello
MV /src/file.txt /dst/file.txt
LS /src
LS /dst
READ /dst/file.txt
MV /src /moved
LS /

MKDIR /original
MKDIR /original/sub
TOUCH /original/file.txt
WRITE /original/file.txt content
TOUCH /original/sub/nested.txt
WRITE /original/sub/nested.txt deep
CP /original /backup
READ /backup/file.txt
READ /backup/sub/nested.txt
LS /backup
WRITE /original/file.txt changed
READ /original/file.txt
READ /backup/file.txt
testcases.output:
content
deep
file.txt
sub/
changed
content

testcases.input:

MKDIR /project/test
TOUCH /project/src/main.cpp
TOUCH /project/test/main.cpp
TOUCH /project/src/util.cpp
TOUCH /project/readme.md
FIND / main.cpp
FIND /project/src main.cpp
FIND / readme.md
FIND / missing.txt

MKDIR /foo
MKDIR /foo/sub
RM /foo
MKDIR /bar
RM -r /bar
RM -r /bar
TOUCH /foo/sub/file.txt
TOUCH /foo/sub/file.txt
READ /foo

ERROR: not empty
ERROR: not found
ERROR: already exists
ERROR: is a directory
